overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from GTA V showing a character walking through a sunny urban commercial district in Los Santos. The character navigates sidewalks, crosses intersections, and passes various storefronts including a burger restaurant and car wash, with the downtown skyline visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial sidewalk with fast food restaurants

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk past commercial storefronts and palm trees

entered.detail: fast food restaurant with distinctive yellow and red signage
tall commercial sign for sandwich shop
tall palm trees lining the sidewalk
multi-story commercial buildings across the street
black metal fence bordering restaurant property

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a sunlit commercial sidewalk lined with palm trees, passing a Burger Shot restaurant on the right. The street is relatively quiet with parked cars visible and few pedestrians around.

scene_state.functional_zone: large urban intersection with pedestrian crosswalk

events.description: character stops at intersection edge waiting for traffic to clear
character begins crossing the street alongside another pedestrian
character turns left while crossing to head down perpendicular street

agents.ego_description: waiting at the intersection for vehicles to pass, then crossing with a pedestrian in a white hoodie

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in white hoodie and dark pants crossing the street alongside the character

entered.detail: wide crosswalk with red painted borders
tall glass and steel skyscrapers of downtown Los Santos visible in distance
overhead traffic signal ganttry spanning the intersection

segments.scene_description: The character reaches a busy intersection, stops to wait for passing vehicles including a FedEx truck, then crosses the street with another pedestrian. The downtown skyline becomes prominently visible in the background as the character navigates the crosswalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with billboards and storefronts

agents.ego_description: continuing down the sidewalk past various commercial buildings and advertising billboards

entered.detail: low-rise commercial buildings with various storefronts
large commercial advertising billboards mounted on poles

segments.scene_description: After crossing, the character walks along the opposite sidewalk passing various commercial buildings and large billboards. The street is lined with parked cars and occasional pedestrians walking in the opposite direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow commercial side street with discount store

events.description: character turns left onto a narrower side street with different architectural character

agents.ego_description: turning onto a side street and walking past a Discount Store with gated storefronts and cardboard boxes outside

notable_agents.action: woman in purple shirt walking ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: turquoise-colored discount store building with metal security gates
storefronts with metal roll-down security gates
stacked cardboard boxes sitting outside the closed store
wooden utility poles with multiple cross-arms and wires

segments.scene_description: The character turns left onto a narrower side street featuring a Discount Store with turquoise walls and gated storefronts. Cardboard boxes sit outside the closed shops, and the street has a more industrial-commercial feel with prominent utility poles lining the sidewalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with car wash and auto services

events.description: passing the entrance to a car wash facility with distinctive red and white architecture

agents.ego_description: walking past the Car Wash entrance and continuing down the tree-lined street with parked cars

entered.detail: long commercial building housing a car wash facility with distinctive architecture
large red and white signage reading Hand Car Wash
mature trees lining the sidewalk providing shade

segments.scene_description: The character walks past a Hand Car Wash facility with its distinctive red and white signage and architectural details. The street continues with more parked cars and mature trees providing shade, maintaining the urban commercial atmosphere with various storefronts visible along the route.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a sunlit commercial district that shifts from a wide main thoroughfare to a narrower, more industrial side street. It begins with the character walking along a palm-lined sidewalk past a Burger Shot restaurant before reaching a busy intersection. As the character crosses the street alongside another pedestrian, the view expands to prominently reveal the downtown skyline in the distance. The scene then shifts along the opposite sidewalk past large billboards and commercial buildings before turning left into a narrower street characterized by turquoise walls, gated storefronts, and utility poles. Finally, the camera follows the character past a red and white Hand Car Wash facility, moving under the shade of mature trees amidst a row of parked cars.
